title: Enderswords
description: Give your material swords some useful teleporting mechanics!
body:
![purequartztools-title](https://i.ibb.co/xCZvtFk/enderswords-title.png)
![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## 📘 About this mod:



**Enderswords** adds a useful sword variant that has an innate ability to throw Ender Pearls on right click. 

This mod is intended to be used alongside my other mods, which I'm calling "**micro-mods**". I aim to combat bloated, overproduced mods with my simplistic, segmented **micro-mods**. Curate your own features without editing confusing config files and disabling recipes. Check my profile to find more mods, and complete your pack!



![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## 📖 What's inside:



**v3.0.0** - Full refactor, new items!

![enderswords-items](https://i.ibb.co/kBCxmJn/enderswords-items.png "Enderswords - Items")

![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)

## ✋ FAQ:



**Q: Will you backport to any older versions?**  
**A:** No. I prefer to keep my attention on the latest versions.

**Q: Can you add a variant for [insert mod name here]?**  
**A:** Sure. Feel free to open a new suggestion on [GitHub](https://github.com/purejosh/enderswords/issues), and I'll review the suggested mod to see if adding an Endersword variant will be possible. 

**Q: This mod feels a bit overpowered/underpowered. Is there a config?**  
**A:** I've added a few configuration options to this mod, using /gamerule. Check them out in game. If you have a suggestion for a gamerule option, please join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/X6AsDnqex6) and share your thoughts. 

![page-split](https://i.ibb.co/GtgXJND/page-split.png)
#### **Leave a comment!**  
#### **Thanks for downloading!**
